title: schedonorus varius
intro: Schedonorus varius, commonly known as variegated meadow grass or wood grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Schedonorus varius include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve overall cardiovascular health. Schedonorus varius can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote digestive health and well-being.
